construct: Demonstrates understanding of how historical(past) events and current trends shape the future.

elementsOfConstruct.description: Demonstrates understanding of ideologies of Evolution and early civilisation

subSkills.label: Evaluates understanding of Evolution and early civilisation; demonstrates society's core values, beliefs, morals and principles
topicAliases: Development of Iron Technology and Farming
The Way of Life in Stone Age
Views on the Origins of Man

elementsOfConstruct.description: Appreciates historical sites and traditional practices

subSkills.label: Assesses knowledge of Zambia's historical sites and cultural roots

elementsOfConstruct.description: Exhibits good morals, principles and national values

subSkills.label: Demonstrates core values, beliefs, morals and customs

elementsOfConstruct.description: Promotes national patriotism and citizenship through historical events while fostering collaboration with local, regional and international communities

subSkills.label: Engages communities in historical and patriotic activities to enhance good citizenry and collaborative understanding of national issues
topicAliases: Development of Slavery and Slave Trade
Europe and the bene¿ts from Slave trade
Europe and the benefits from Slave trade

elementsOfConstruct.description: Analyses emerging global issues and their sustainability

subSkills.label: Demonstrates understanding of contemporary issues and their effects to the environment
subSkills.note: Limited structured form1-4 topic coverage; provisional aliases pending syllabus cross-check.

components.structureNotes: SBA Form 2: 5 tasks/100. All 5 EoC. Tests, debates, projects, presentations, role play.
Section A: 3 compulsory items from EoC1-3 (20 each). Section B: 4 items from EoC4-5, answer 2 (20 each). Duration 2h30. 70%.

rules: SBA: 100 marks per form; raw marks to ECZ.
Final Exam items typically 20 marks each based on real-life historical scenarios.
Accept any other correct response where indicated in marking schemes.

exemplars.scenarioTheme: Community conflict resolution as city mayor linking historical citizenship/patriotism competences
